tweets.text: Time to try and sleep again, I think.
I have been wanting a turkey sub for many many days now.
I like the idea of one-page summaries that continually update instead of a stream of articles on the same issue, it makes it more doable.
Steady working on @futurelens - my (maybe overly-)ambitious new project to create a breaking news site from scratch. Having a lot of fun.
Two of my friends have been injured by tennis nets in accidents in the last few weeks. Perhaps this is because one of those myspace chains?
@MrEAnders Haha, funnily enough that's what I'm watching now. Watching the Roosevelt Inn one, which was yours?
The Gordon Ramsey shows on FOX are so over-produced you could probably tell the various plot turns without speaking english.
Just took a bath. Now I'm listening to the end of Ender's Game and texting people. Dramadramadrama. I think I may take myself a nap.
Thinking of the possibilities for twitter to be used as a protest aid- helping to coordinate direct action. Has anybody tried this yet?
"We're young, Ender. We play by their rules and soon enough it will be our game." Great shit.
Back home, talked to Shannon on the bus who I haven't talked to in a while. Cool.
Drum lesson. Band to begin, band to end. This shit owns.
RT @shashashasha: Never forget https://t.co/NanlyLEIy5
Gym now. Raining kind of. Come onnnnn rainnnn.
At school now, gotta find my locker and shit. Stupid fucking cramped bus.
Doing my Earth Science homework, eating toast, drinking rockstar+orange juice, and very much not wanting to run in gym. I'm out of shape.
It looks like it would be best to head to AZ is late october (20+) and return early December (20-). Gotta figure other things out. Shyuh.
Every morning I wake up and either feel sick or throw up. I think I'm pregnant.
I could not be any happier with the song I just recorded.
Okay. Fringe looks incredible. I honestly can't get enough. I'm more excited about Fringe than any other show on television right now. Yay?
Watching Fringe- the X-Files wannabe. So far it looks excellent. Who knows though, you know?
I miss hacking. Damn.
"These servers have more firewalls than the Devil's Bedroom" - Numb3rs -- I love it.
The interior department had “a culture of substance abuse and promiscuity”. So it was basically a mirror of America? http://is.gd/2shi
Watching Top Gear even though I don't know anything about cars or british people.
RT @Visually: A Visual History of the TSA and Airline Terror #infographic by @pseudoplacebo http://j.mp/r20OUZ

@Joshochos now that I make money again I can finally afford to buy this game lol

checking it out now
gawker and the whole culture around it, people who love it, people who hate it, all completely unbearable - you are all old
Up late, working on a new dubstep mix. It's pretty ridiculously filthy, but sort of a jazz-step theme going on... oh well it's fun to do.
RT @pbump: From last month: How much of your life the U.S. has been at war. https://t.co/rn2nFYCdBq https://t.co/seec0IEqhC

- teaching
- art
playing a little Fable II. http://raptr.com/pseudoplacebo
I unlocked 4 Xbox achievements on Fable II! http://raptr.com/pseudoplacebo
RT @stevesilberman: What would 9/11 have been like with social media? It would have been exactly like this. http://t.co/Me5NYQ6pkc
I just wanna say I love that Colbert is back.
My place is a shithole right now. No time to clean... deadline. =|
Feels like fall outside.
